tools.short_description: Real-time Power BI dashboard connecting ERP, field data, and logistics into a unified operations view.
tools.problem_description: Decision makers had no single pane of glass — data lived in 4 disconnected systems with no automated refresh.
tools.solution_approach: Designed a star-schema data model in SQL Server, built ETL pipelines in Azure Data Factory, and authored a Power BI report with 12 interactive pages covering KPIs, forecasts, and drill-throughs.
tools.results_or_impact: Reduced weekly reporting effort by 14 hours. Became the primary decision tool for the operations team of 40+ staff.

tools.short_description: Command-line OCR tool for extracting structured invoice data from PDF invoices, supporting Hebrew and English text, validation, and export to JSON, CSV, and Excel.
tools.problem_description: Invoice data is often locked inside PDF files, making manual extraction slow, error-prone, and difficult to scale across many documents and formats.
tools.solution_approach: The project converts invoice PDFs into images, applies Tesseract OCR, extracts key invoice fields using pattern matching, validates the extracted data, and exports structured results in JSON, CSV, or Excel formats.
tools.results_or_impact: Automates invoice processing workflows by producing structured, validated invoice outputs from raw PDF files. The project includes 95%+ test coverage and supports batch processing for multiple PDF invoices.

research.project_title: Remote Sensing Indices for Early Crop Stress Detection
research.short_description: Comparative analysis of NDVI, EVI, and SAVI indices for early-stage abiotic stress detection in field crops.
research.problem_description: Early detection of crop stress (water, nutrient, pest) using remote sensing remains inconsistent across crop types and growth stages.
research.solution_approach: Conducted a controlled field study correlating in-situ biomass and stress measurements with four remote sensing indices across three crop species over two growing seasons.
research.results_or_impact: EVI outperformed NDVI in high-biomass conditions by 23%. Provided practical thresholds for operational stress alert systems.

research.project_title: Data-Driven Irrigation Scheduling in Semi-Arid Environments
research.short_description: Framework combining soil moisture sensors, ET models, and weather APIs to optimize irrigation timing.
research.problem_description: Irrigation over-application is a major driver of water waste in semi-arid agriculture. Traditional scheduling is calendar-based, not demand-based.
research.solution_approach: Designed an integrated sensing and decision framework using IoT soil moisture probes, Penman-Monteith ET calculations, and ML-based anomaly detection for optimal scheduling recommendations.
research.results_or_impact: 15–22% reduction in water application with no measurable yield loss across 3 trial seasons. Framework adopted as basis for regional guidelines.
